message:
fix(serve): update TestToJSONMap nil-input expectation to match new empty-map behavior

toJSONMap(nil) now returns a non-nil empty map instead of nil, which
is safer for downstream consumers that iterate the result without a
nil check. Update the test assertion to expect len(m) == 0 on a
non-nil map rather than asserting m == nil.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
